highlights.text: I wrote on Wednesday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: There is a possible short on the failure of 6954….
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is after today’s pullback ES can try some backtesting.
As I discuss at length it typically does two things: Firstly ES goes elevator down .
These short squeezes are caused by one thing: My core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
I wrote last Thursday at 4pm (over 1 week ago): “Below there one very obvious trade is a Failed Breakdown of the December 17th 6773 low.
When does ES go Elevator Down ?

For the 6954 short one wants to see a final bounce there, then one can short perhaps 6950.” Yesterday morning we broke the range down and got an elevator down sell into 6808 by this morning The task for bulls today (CPI day) was to put in a Failed Breakdown and try to rally and back-test some of the zones that broke down yesterday.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

post_title: Just Like Last Friday, SPX Bulls Bought The Dip. Are We Headed Back To The Highs? Feb 16/17 Plan
